page: Microsoft Azure FX32-16ms_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the FXmsv2 family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at a high clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The configuration includes 8 physical cores and 16 virtual CPUs (vCPUs) with hyper-threading enabled, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a massive memory allocation of 672.0 GB, translating to 42.0 GB of RAM per core, making it highly memory-intensive. No local storage or GPUs are included in this configuration.

In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates exceptional single-core capabilities, with its Geekbench single-core and text processing scores ranking in the top tier (top 10%). It also shows strong performance in memory write bandwidth for large uncached blocks (90.97 GB/sec), single-threaded gzip compression (34.66 GB/sec), and single-threaded bzip3 decompression. Multi-core performance, database operations, and static web serving throughput align with average mid-tier expectations.

Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio and dedicated high-frequency Intel Xeon processor, this server offers a specialized hardware profile. The lack of bundled local storage means storage requirements must be met via external premium storage. The resource density makes it highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale in-memory databases, heavy text processing, and single-threaded execution paths that benefit from high clock speeds and a large L3 cache of 260 MB.
description: Microsoft Azure FX32-16ms_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the FXmsv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 8 physical cores and 16 vCPUs operating at a high clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The server is equipped with an extensive 672.0 GB of RAM, providing 42.0 GB of memory per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks highlight top-tier single-core and text processing capabilities, alongside strong memory write bandwidth and single-threaded decompression speeds. This hardware profile is highly efficient for memory-intensive applications, in-memory databases, and workloads requiring high single-core compute performance coupled with massive memory capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure FX32-16ms_v2 is a memory-optimized server featuring 16 vCPUs, an Intel Xeon 8573C processor at 4.2 GHz, and 672 GB of RAM, delivering top-tier single-core performance for memory-intensive workloads.

tagline: A high-frequency, memory-intensive virtual server featuring massive RAM-to-core ratios and top-tier single-core processing performance for demanding enterprise workloads.
